## What changed

Describe the bounded change and the problem it solves.

## Evidence

- [ ] Project tests pass
- [ ] Installed-skill tests pass
- [ ] Python sources compile
- [ ] `self_check.py` passes
- [ ] Changed behavior has a regression test
- [ ] Performance claims include workload, baseline, correctness, measurement, and environment evidence
- [ ] No host-level setting was changed without explicit authorization
